name: Berserker

polish_details.material_upgrade: procedural PBR (noise/voronoi textures, color ramps, bump, emission)
polish_details.lighting: enemy studio (cool violet key, red fill, white rim)

dimensions.body_type: heavy gorilla-proportioned, short legs, massive arms

style_guide_alignment.silhouette: Heavy angular, containment/retaliation archetype — clearly bigger and slower than Shadow Imp
style_guide_alignment.charge_tell: Chest core + fist glows + eyes pulse red-violet before charge attack
style_guide_alignment.damage_feedback: Red crack lines on chest plate glow when taking damage
style_guide_alignment.corruption: Deep violet-black, darker than imp, with metallic armor plates

next_gate: UE5 import, skeleton/rigging, charge AI behavior, Play-In-Editor combat test
